records.display_name: Slow Bus Speeds Along Kings Highway

payload.claim_text: Traffic/parking/truck loading lead to slow bus speeds along Kings Highway. Routing from Flatlands Ave to Kings Hwy is slow, adds to congestion. Complicated routing around Rockaway Pkwy Station leads to slow bus speeds.

records.raw_text: Traffic/parking/truck loading lead to slow bus speeds along Kings Highway. Routing from Flatlands Ave to Kings Hwy is slow, adds to congestion. Complicated routing around Rockaway Pkwy Station leads to slow bus speeds.

records.display_name: B82 Delay Type Breakdown

payload.claim_text: Buses are delayed by traffic, double parking, difficulty pulling in and out of bus stops. In Motion 48%, Signal Delay 29%, Bus Stops 21%, Other Delays 2%

records.raw_text: Delay Type Percentage In Motion 48% Signal Delay 29% Bus Stops 21% Other Delays 2%. Buses are delayed by traffic, double parking, difficulty pulling in and out of bus stops.

records.display_name: Kings Highway Business Survey Results

payload.claim_text: Interviews with 235 businesses along Kings Highway. 67% of businesses report double parking interferes with deliveries. 46% report vehicles at curb interfere with deliveries. 2/3 of deliveries take 15 minutes or less. 48% of businesses would find a delivery zone helpful.

records.raw_text: Interviews with 235 businesses along Kings Highway. 67% of businesses report double parking interferes with deliveries. 46% of businesses report vehicles at curb interfere with deliveries. 2/3 of deliveries take 15 minutes or less. 48% of businesses would find a delivery zone helpful.

records.display_name: B82 Limited Service Gap

payload.claim_text: B82 Limited existing service does not operate mid-day or evenings. B82 SBS will operate for more hours of the day than the B82 Limited.

records.raw_text: B82 SBS will operate for more hours of the day than the B82 Limited (existing service does not operate mid-day or evenings)

records.display_name: Kings Highway Shopper Survey Mode Split

payload.claim_text: Face-to-face interviews with 7,500 people on Kings Highway between W 10th St and Ocean Ave. Weekday: Walk 51%, Car 23%, Transit 24% (Bus 11%, Subway 13%). Weekend: Walk 58%, Car 21%, Transit 19% (Bus 8%, Subway 11%).

records.raw_text: Face-to-face interviews with 7,500 people on Kings Highway between W 10th St and Ocean Ave. Weekday Method: Walk 51%, Car 23%, Transit 24%, Bus 11%, Subway 13%. Weekend Method: Walk 58%, Car 21%, Transit 19%, Bus 8%, Subway 11%.

records.display_name: Key Safety Issues on B82 in CB 15

payload.claim_text: Key safety issues identified along the B82 Route in CB 15: Long pedestrian crossings and lack of pedestrian refuges to cross Kings Hwy, narrow median bus stops along Kings Hwy, limited visibility at some intersections.

records.raw_text: Key Safety Issues Identified along the B82 Route in CB 15: Long pedestrian crossings and lack of pedestrian refuges to cross Kings Hwy. Narrow median bus stops along Kings Hwy. Limited visibility at some intersections.

records.display_name: Kings Highway Parking Space Changes

payload.claim_text: Part-time spaces used for bus lanes: -108 (7-10 AM, 4-7 PM Mon-Fri). Full-time spaces removed: -4 (bus stop lengthening at 2 stops). New full-time spaces created: +21 (Bus stop removal, new angled/parallel parking). Part-time parking changes for bus lanes only apply for 25% of the day on weekdays. For 75% of the day on weekdays and full-time on weekends, there will be more parking available than there is currently.

records.raw_text: # of Parking Spaces. Part-time spaces used for bus lanes: -108. 7-10 AM, 4-7 PM Mon-Fri. Full-time spaces removed: -4 (bus stop lengthening at 2 stops). New full-time spaces created: +21 (Bus stop removal, new angled/parallel parking). Part-time parking changes for bus lanes only apply for 25% of the day on weekdays. For 75% of the day on weekdays and full-time on weekends, there will be more parking available than there is currently.
